nodes.label: Unit tests for LangGraphWorkflowAdapter.  These tests verify that the workflow a
Test initialization with valid state class.
Test initialization with None state class raises error.
Test that initialization creates LangGraph StateGraph.
Test that initialization sets compilation flags to False.
Test initialization with complex state class.
Test adding node with empty name raises error.
Test adding node with None name raises error.
Test adding node with reserved name __start__ raises error.
Test adding node with reserved name __end__ raises error.
Test adding node with synchronous function.
Test adding node with asynchronous function.
Test adding node with lambda function.
Test adding node with invalid function (not callable).
Test adding node with non-string name.
Test adding edge between two nodes.
Test adding edge with empty source raises error.
Test adding edge with empty target raises error.
Test adding edge with None source raises error.
Test adding edge with None target raises error.
Test adding multiple edges from the same source node.
Test that special markers (__start__, __end__) are converted correctly.
Test conditional edge with empty source raises error.
Test conditional edge with None condition raises error.
Test conditional edge with empty mapping raises error.
Test conditional edge with __end__ marker in mapping.
Test conditional edge with multiple routes.
Test setting entry point with empty node name raises error.
Test setting entry point with None node name raises error.
Test setting entry point to nonexistent node.
Test that compile sets the _is_built flag.
Test that compile creates a compiled graph instance.
Test compiling incomplete workflow raises error.
Test that calling compile multiple times is safe (idempotent).
Tests for execute and ainvoke methods.
Test that execute raises error if workflow not compiled.
Test that execute preserves state data through workflow.
Test executing workflow with multiple nodes.
Test executing workflow with async nodes.
Test that node function exceptions are wrapped in WorkflowExecutionError.
Test that ainvoke delegates to execute.
Test that ainvoke returns the same result as execute.
Test that execute with None state raises WorkflowExecutionError.
Test that execute with wrong state type raises WorkflowExecutionError.
Test that execute with missing required keys raises WorkflowExecutionError.
Test that state validation happens before workflow execution.
Test that ainvoke also validates state.
Test that get_graph returns the underlying StateGraph.
Test that get_compiled returns None before compilation.
Test that get_compiled returns compiled graph after compilation.
Test that is_compiled returns False before compilation.
Test that is_compiled returns True after compilation.
Test that reset clears compilation state.
